ingredients.item:
POTATOES
3 large yellow potatoes (about 1½ pounds, or 650 g), peeled and cut into ¾-inch (2 cm) cubes
2 tablespoons avocado oil
ingredients.original:
POTATOES
3 large yellow potatoes (about 1½ pounds, or 650 g), peeled and cut into ¾-inch (2 cm) cubes
2 tablespoons avocado oil

ingredients.item:
CHICKEN
1½ pounds (700 g) boneless, skinless chicken thighs, cut into ¾-inch (2 cm) cubes (see Note)
1½ teaspoons kosher salt
ingredients.original:
CHICKEN
1½ pounds (700 g) boneless, skinless chicken thighs, cut into ¾-inch (2 cm) cubes (see Note)
1½ teaspoons kosher salt

ingredients.item: 2 cups (400 g) long-grain white basmati rice, rinsed until the water runs clear and drained completely
ingredients.original: 2 cups (400 g) long-grain white basmati rice, rinsed until the water runs clear and drained completely

ingredients.item:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
1 tablespoon avocado oil
½ cup (55 g) slivered almonds
ingredients.original:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
1 tablespoon avocado oil
½ cup (55 g) slivered almonds

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE POTATOES: Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C) and position a rack on the bottom. Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE POTATOES: Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C) and position a rack on the bottom. Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper.

ingredients.item: 2 Add the potatoes to the sheet pan and toss with the 2 tablespoons oil and ½ teaspoon salt. Smooth the cubes into a single layer and bake for 25 to 30 minutes on the bottom rack, until golden and soft.
ingredients.original: 2 Add the potatoes to the sheet pan and toss with the 2 tablespoons oil and ½ teaspoon salt. Smooth the cubes into a single layer and bake for 25 to 30 minutes on the bottom rack, until golden and soft.
